specs.title: lists the three seeded users in the selector
selecting a user and submitting signs in and redirects to the dashboard
logout returns to the login screen
Email & password tab shows the form
signs in with seeded admin credentials and lands on the dashboard
signs in as viewer via password and shows the limited dashboard
shows an error for wrong password without leaving the login page
blocks submit when password is shorter than 8 characters (client validation)
blocks submit when email is not valid (client validation)
redirects unauthenticated visitors from /dashboard to /login
RBAC matrix for dashboard sections, actions, role editing, and header
Admin sees Add User and the Edit Role button is enabled
Editor: Add User hidden, Edit Role visible but disabled, Delete hidden
Viewer: roles section hidden, no actions, no Role column
users table action controls are role-based
role-based action visibility matrix
password visibility toggle switches the password input type
password login email validates on blur
password login password validates on blur
add user modal closes when clicking the backdrop
editing a user updates table values and shows success toast
add user form validates invalid email before submit
add user form validates email on blur
edit user form validates invalid email before submit
edit user form validates email on blur
admin can update a role permission and revert it
cancel keeps the user and closes the modal
confirm removes the user and shows success toast
